org.apache.juneau.marshall.bson.BsonSerializer

All Implemented Interfaces:
Function<Object,byte[]>, ThrowingFunction<Object,byte[]>, BsonMetaProvider, ArrayRecordWritable, RecordWritable

public static class BsonSerializer.Base64 extends BsonSerializer
Default serializer, BASE64 string output.
